locations: Wizard City: The Catacombs - Fathomless Tomb
cheats: If a Wizard joins the battle after the second Round, Fellspawn casts Call of Khrulhu (Shadow).
At the start of the first Round, Fellspawn summons any 3 of the following Minions:
Balance Tentacular Horror
Death Tentacular Horror
Fire Tentacular Horror
Ice Tentacular Horror
Life Tentacular Horror
Myth Tentacular Horror
Shadow Tentacular Horror
Storm Tentacular Horror
At the end of the third Round, after a Minion is killed, a random school Minion is summoned. After this, another Minion will be summoned at the end of every fourth Round.

At the start of the first Round, Fellspawn casts an Equalize, which sets the Damage cap to 9,999. Damage cannot go above this limit while Global is present. If the Global is replaced, it will be recast.
At the start of the fifth Round, Fellspawn summons an Unhelpful Spawn on the Wizard's team if all duel slots are not filled.
Sacrificial Spells, such as Sap Power, will not remove the Minion from the duel slot.
If the Wizard in the first duel slot flees, this summon will disappear.
Fellspawn will resummon the Minion soon after it is defeated.
At the end of every fifth Round, Fellspawn will cheat-cast a Black Mantle, Hex, and Weakness, each on a random Wizard, and cast Bladestorm and Mass Tower Shield (Ice).
Every six Rounds, Fellspawn will Polymorph into a Moon form lasting for three Rounds, starting on Round 3, with different cheats.
Shadow-Storm:
If a Wizard casts a Blade, Fellspawn will Mana Burn (Shadow) the caster, dealing 600 Shadow Damage per Pip, and Enfeeble (Shadow) the receiver of the Blade.
If an all-allies Spell such as Bladestorm is cast, only the caster's Blade will be removed.
Non-Blade Charms such as Guiding Light will not activate this cheat.
Moon Polymorph Form:
While in Polymorph form, Fellspawn loses all stats and cannot gain Power Pips or Shadow Pips.
If a Wizard casts a Trap, he will cast Cleanse Ward (Shadow, -All) to remove all Traps from the target of the Trap, and cast Stun (Shadow) that Stuns the caster for two Rounds.
Spells with a Trap after effect, such as Brimstone Revenant, will trigger this cheat.
Prisms will not trigger this cheat.

name: Freddie Kroaker (Challenge)
cheats: Freddie Kroaker:

[Dispel][Ward] "One, two, I'm coming for you!" - At the beginning of the the first Round, Freddie Kroaker will cast a Shadow Spell that applies a Dispel Charm of the Wizard's School on each Wizard, and then place a 'Nightmare Prone' Stun Shield on a random Wizard.

[Charm][Dispel] "Let the malus grow! Let it feed my beast!" - At the beginning of every Round after the second Round, Freddie Kroaker casts a Moon version of Balanceblade that says "GROWTH," and then a Dispel Charm of the Wizard's School on each Wizard.
The above cheat will not activate if a "GROWTH" Charm was cleared by his cheats the previous turn.

[Damage] "It lives! My Juggernaut Crab of Malus lives! The Great Barrier will fall!" - At the end of each Round, if Freddie Kroaker has 3 "GROWTH" Charms, he will cast a Moon version of Call of Khrulhu that deals 1,000,000 Damage on all Wizards.

[Healing] - "This better not be love conquering all!" - If a Wizard casts a Healing Spell, a positive Healing Charm, a Healing Global, or an outgoing Healing Aura, then Freddie Kroaker will cast a version of Enfeeble that removes all Charms from himself, and a version of Cleanse Ward that removes all Wards (including the 'Nightmare Prone' mark) from the receiver.

[All Friends (Squared)] - "You're spread too thin! Three, four, we've only started our war!" - If a Wizard casts an All Allies Spell, Freddie Kroaker will cast an Equalize Global, setting the Damage cap to 3,000.
[Charm] - "Blades are the forte of Storm, Death and Life!" - If a Wizard casts a Helpful Charm and is not Storm, Death, or Life, Freddie Kroaker will cast Ice Wyvern (Tier 5b) on the receiver.

[Curse] - "Negative Charms are the forte of Death, Storm and Ice!" - If a Wizard casts a Harmful Charm and is not Death, Storm, or Ice, Freddie Kroaker will cast Stone Colossus (Tier 5b) on the caster.
[Ward] - "Shields are the forte of Ice, Myth and Death!" - If a Wizard casts a Helpful Ward and is not Ice, Myth, or Death, Freddie Kroaker will cast Helephant (Tier 5b) on the receiver.
[Jinx] - "Traps are the forte of Myth, Fire and Ice!" - If a Wizard casts a Harmful Ward and is not Myth, Fire, or Ice, Freddie Kroaker will cast Centaur (Tier 5b) on the caster.
[Damage over Time] - "DoT's are the forte of Fire, Myth and Life!" - If a Wizard casts a Damage over Time and is not Fire, Myth, or Life, Freddie Kroaker will cast Stormzilla (Tier 5b) on the caster.

[Heal over Time] - "Heals are the forte of Life, Storm and Fire!" - If a Wizard casts a Heal over Time and is not Life, Storm, or Fire, Freddie Kroaker will cast Skeletal Pirate (Tier 5b) on the receiver.
[Pip] - "Pips are the forte of Balance!" - If a Wizard casts a Pip manipulation Spell, such as Empower or Dark Surge, and is not Balance, Freddie Kroaker will cast Mana Burn on the receiver.
Arcane Toad (Star-Storm, Challenge):
[Blade] "Too many blades!" - If a Wizard has three or more Helpful Charms, Arcane Toad (Star-Storm) will cast Banshee (Tier 5b) on the receiver of the Charm.
[Trap] "Too many traps!" - If an enemy has three or more Harmful Wards, Arcane Toad (Star-Storm) will cast Immolate (Tier 5b) on the caster of the Ward.
[Damage] "One, two, Freddie's not done with you!" - If Freddie Kroaker is targeted or an All Enemies Spell is used, Arcane Toad (Star-Storm) will give all Wizards a Living Nightmare card:
[Living Nightmare]
Arcane Toad (Moon-Storm, Challenge)

[Curse][Ward] "Sweet dreams, wizard." - At the beginning of the first Round, and at the end of every fourth Round, Arcane Toad (Moon-Storm) casts Smoke Screen (Shadow), and then places a 'Nightmare Prone' Stun Shield on a random Wizard.
Cleanse Ward can be used to remove the mark.

[Round] "One, two, here's a nightmare for you!" - At the end of each Round, if a Wizard has the 'Nightmare Prone' mark, Arcane Toad (Moon-Storm) casts one of the following Spells on the marked Wizard:
Call of Khrulhu
Monster Mash (Tier 5a)
Shift Grey Wolf
Winged Sorrow

name: Frostbranch
cheats: Interrupt Cycle
"You have little time to hurt me!" - At the start of the duel (and every five Rounds thereafter), Frostbranch will cheat-cast two Smoke Screens (-50%) at each Wizard.
The first Smoke Screen cheat-cast has a casting animation; however, the second one does not.
Quench can be used to Dispel the Smoke Screen.

"Who doesn't have a Mark of Courage?" - At the start of every fifth Round, Frostbranch will cheat-cast Efreet dealing 895 Fire Damage applying a -90% Weakness at any Wizard who does not have a "Mark of Courage". On the same Round, Frostbranch will use its turn to cast Earthquake (310) without using Pips, regardless of if any Wizard in the battle has a "Mark of Courage".
Vaporize can be used to Dispel the Earthquake.
Quench can be used to Dispel Efreet, even though it has no casting animation.
One Quench is required for every Efreet Dispelled.

"A true warrior!" - If a Wizard attacks Frostbranch with a single-target Spell, he will remove all Smoke Screens from the Wizard, and place a "Mark of Courage" on the Wizard in the form of a Stun Shield.
Pet Maycast Talents will not activate this cheat.
If Frostbranch has reached the "Who doesn't have a Mark of Courage?" phase of his cycle most recently (he has not recast his Smoke Screens yet), direct attacks will not yield any Stun Shields.

Since the Marks of Courage are Stun Shields, they are not removed by Earthquake nor stolen by Thieving Dragon. This means that wizards need only attack directly once to avoid Frostbranch's Efreet cheat.

locations: Khrysalis: Last Wood - General Lightbane's Chamber
cheats: "Scour the Light and Raise the Shadow!" - At the beginning of the first Round, General Lightbane will cast one of the versions of these following Spells. This cheat will repeat after attacking.
Dark Nova, Dark Shepherd, Dark Fiend
These Spells are accelerated, adding a +40% Shadowblade at the end of Round 1, and the second effect Shadowspear and Shadow Trap Round two and attacking the same Round.
General Lightbane will cast a Shadow Spell to summon one of the following Minions, and they will affect the Spells it casts accordingly.
These cheats repeat after the two Round Shadow-Creature Spell cycle.
[Healing] "Beware, my thrall, of Healing" - Seraph of Salvation (Tier 1) [Shadow][Life].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Minor Blessing & Fairy.
These will be cast on the minion.
[Damage] "Beware, my thrall, of Damage" - Frenzied Shrike (Tier 1) [Shadow][Death].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Super Shadowplume & Headless Horseman (Shadow).
[Heal over Time] "Beware, my thrall, of HOTs" - Mending Trickster (Tier 1) [Shadow][Life].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Vitamins & Regenerate.

General Lightbane will use his turns casting Storm Elf (Shadow) & Heck Hound.
[Blade] "Beware, my thrall, of Charms" - Charming Trickster (Tier 1) [Shadow][Storm].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Dragonblade & Chromatic Blast.
[Curse] "Beware, my thrall, of Curses" - Cursed Shrike (Tier 1) [Shadow][Storm].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Weakness & Virulent Plague.
[Ward] "Beware, my thrall, of Wards" - Mighty Sentinel (Tier 1) [Shadow][Balance].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Tower Shield & Frozen Armor.
[Trap] "Beware, my thrall, of Jinxes" - Trapper Shrike (Tier 1) [Shadow][Myth].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Hex & Mass Feint (+70%).
[Pacify] "Beware, my thrall, of Pacify" - Mollifying Sentinel (Tier 1) [Shadow][Life].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Pacify & Tranquilize.
[Threat] "Beware, my thrall, of Taunts" - Mocking Sentinel (Tier 1) [Shadow][Ice].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Taunt & Mega Taunt.
[Global] "Beware, my thrall, of Globals" - Seraph of Sacred Ground (Tier 1) [Shadow][Balance].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Doom and Gloom & Shadow Global.
[Aura] "Beware, my thrall, of Auras" - Seraph of Blessings (Tier 1) [Shadow][Star].
General Lightbane will use his turns casting Frenzy & Frenzy (5 Pip).
"Your magic feeds the Shadow" - Using the wrong Spell type against a certain Cycle Phase will trigger the following response casts from General Lightbane:
[Healing] - Healing will trigger Blessing on his minion.
[Damage] - Damage will trigger Super Shadowplume.
[Heal over Time] - Heal over Time will trigger Sprite on his minion.
[Damage over Time] - Damage over Time will trigger Scald.
[Blade] - Blades will trigger Balanceblade.
[Curse] - Negative Damage Charms will trigger Plague.
[Ward] - Shields will trigger Legion Shield.
[Trap] - Traps will trigger Mass Hex.
[Pacify] - Pacifies will trigger Subdue.
[Threat] - Taunts will trigger Taunt.
[Global] - Globals will trigger Shadow Global.
[Aura] - Auras will trigger Frenzy.
"Gah!" - Casting the opposite Spell Type of a given Minion will cause it to use Sacrifice on itself, losing 20% maximum Health. This will increase the backlash of the Boss by +10.
(Needs confirmation)
Seraph of Salvation -> Damage
Frenzied Shrike -> Healing
Mending Trickster -> Damage over Time
Sly Trickster -> Heal over Time
Charming Trickster -> Negative Damage Charm

name: General Stormclaw
cheats: At the beginning of the first Round, General Stormclaw will cast a -65% Tower Shield on himself, and replace it whenever he is hit.
He will place another Tower Shield on himself every three to four Rounds.
Using Steal Ward will bypass this cheat.
At the end of the first Round, he will cheat-cast Earthquake and summon his Minions.

He will cast a version of Cleanse Ward that removes two negative Wards if a Trap is placed on him or his Minions, and removes Weakness from himself and his Minions, and even sometimes from Wizards, but stops removing them after his Minions have been defeated.
"I saw that!!" - If a Wizard attacks Tired Fighter then the following cheats will occur by interrupt.
Lazy Henchmen will cheat-cast Rebirth healing 750 without absorbs.
Half-Witted Skeleton cheat-casts Colossus after Rebirth cheat.
All Enemy Spells from the Wizard's team don't trigger this cheat.
Whenever Half-Witted Skeleton casts Blizzard, or Tired Fighter casts Tempest, only the Rebirth cheat will trigger.
"Help me!" - If General Stormclaw is attacked, his Minions will cast the following spells:
Lazy Henchman will cheat-cast Rebirth (without absorbs). It will also cheat-cast this Spell if the Half-Witted Skeleton or Tired Fighter is attacked.
Tired Fighter will cheat-cast Storm Lord.
For Spells that hit more than once (e.g. Chimera, Hydra, Orthrus, Minotaur, Damage over Times etc.), the Minions will cheat-cast their Spells for each time the Boss was hit.
The Round after all three Minions have been defeated, he will cheat-cast Frost Giant dealing 475 Damage.
If all Minions are defeated in the same Round going first, he will activate this on the same turn, not the one after.

name: General Tung-Ak
locations: Novus: Stone of Heaven - Tung-Ak's Stronghold
cheats: "My armory is infinite" - At the beginning of every Round, General Tung-Ak casts one of the following Shadow Spells.
Protected 1,500 Absorb Damage Ward.
Protected +500 Flat Damage Charm.
"Even the ancestors are mine to command!" - General Tung-Ak casts Guardian Spirit (20%) on himself.

name: Ghost Dog (Shadow)
cheats: "Devote your body and soul to your master!" - At the end of the first Round, Ghost Dog will summon two Hagakure Blades Minions and one Seijun Killer Minion. They become active during the second Round.

"Feel the poetry of war!" - At the end of the second Round, and every five Rounds thereafter, Ghost Dog will interrupt-cast a Damage over Time Spell that deals 400 Death Damage per Round for ten Rounds, or 575 Death Damage per Round in Shadow form.
When this cheat is triggered, Ghost Dog will target the Wizard with the most generated threat, or the Wizard in the first position (Sun spot) of the Duel by default.

"The way of the Samoorai is found in death!" - At the end of the fifth Round, and every five Rounds thereafter, Ghost Dog will interrupt-cast a Death version of Detonate on the Wizard who received the Damage over Time effect, dealing 2,800 Death Damage.
If this cheat is Dispelled, then Ghost Dog will interrupt-cast Detonate again to hit his target.
"Be resolved from the beginning!" - If a Wizard casts a helpful Ward, then Ghost Dog will interrupt-cast Shatter on the Wizard that cast the Ward.
Pet spells do not trigger this cheat.
spellNotes: This Boss uses Shadow Shrike MOB with +15 Backlash.

name: Gibson O'Leary (Rank 11)
cheats: "Uh oh, you dropped your little Blade!" - If a Wizard casts a Blade, Gibson O'Leary will cheat-cast Steal Charm on the receiver of the Blade, then he will proceed to destroy it.
"I think that Blade would look better on me!" - If a universal Blade, Elemental Blade, or Fireblade is cast, he will cheat-cast Steal Charm on the receiver of the Blade.
"You can't mess with us!" - If any type of universal Trap is placed on an enemy, he will cheat-cast Backdraft on the Wizard who cast the Trap.
"Allow me to lower the boom!" - When a single Trap or DoT is placed on a Wizard, he will cheat-cast Detonate on the Wizard.

name: Gladiator Dimachaerus (Challenge)
locations: Wizard City: Mount Olympus (Challenge) - Pit of the Noxii (Challenge)
cheats: [Round] "I can smell your weakness" - At the beginning of every Round, Gladiator Dimachaerus will cast his Natural Attack on the Wizard with the lowest current health, which deals 180 Balance Damage and has an additional effect based on the attacked Wizard's School:
[Storm] or [Death] - A +55% version of Hex
[Ice] or [Myth] - A Damage over Time that deals 150 Balance Damage over 3 Rounds
[Life] or [Fire] or [Balance] - A -35% version of Weakness

name: Gobblorian Bandit
cheats: The Wizard can cast Brush Fire, Dismal Seraph, Fabled Revenant, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, and War Oracle as inspired Casts during this battle.
At the end of every Round, Gobblorian Bandit will cast Power Current on itself.
Boss sometimes uses Sprite on himself to set up a Gambit.
spellNotes: Casts a 6 Pip version of Blizzard that deals 555 Ice Damage and removes 3 positive Charms from all enemies.
Casts a 6 Pip version of Ratatoskr's Spin that deals 555 Life Damage, and removes 3 negative Wards from all allies.

name: Golden Horde Captain
cheats: "Feel the wrath of the Horde" - At the end of every two Rounds, Golden Horde Captain will cast one of the following spells:
Unicorn, Sacred Charge, Centaur, Headless Horseman,
Chivalrous Centaur, Snow Angel, Shift Otomo, Shift Margherita

name: Golden Horde Colonel
cheats: [Round] "I empower the horde!" - At the end of every two Rounds, Golden Horde Colonel will cast Donate Power.

name: Golden Horde Storykeeper
locations: MooShu: Catmandu - Temple of Purrfect Harmony
cheats: [Round] "I can't read and now neither can you!" - At the beginning of the first Round, Golden Horde Storykeeper will cast a Shadow Spell to give all Wizards three of a random assortment of cards.
If a Wizard joins the battle late, they will receive these three cards at the beginning of the next Round.
[Uioweajdsfamdsa][Reqpivunadhfjkw][Vzpoaiejfandvjha]
[Round] "Burn, books, burn!" - At the start of every fifth Round, Golden Horde Storykeeper will cast Scald.

name: Goliath
cheats: [Harmful Aura] "I may be demimortal, but you will be half of even that!" At the beginning of the first Round, Goliath will cast a Spell that deals 50% max Health Damage to all Wizards, and applies a -50% outgoing Damage Aura for 99 Rounds on all Wizards.
[Late] If a Wizard joins after the first Round, Goliath will cheat cast this on any late Wizard, but will not re-cast it on any Wizards already present in the battle.
[Aura] "In my presence, you shall always be semi-demi-mortal!" If a Wizard casts a helpful Aura Spell, Goliath will re-cast the -50% outgoing Damage Aura on them.
Removing the Aura using conditional Spells such as Poison (Tier 2b) or Shu (Tier 2b) will not result in Goliath re-casting the Aura.

name: Goliath Bra'kym'tra
locations: Zafaria: Baobab Crown - Zafaria Student Dormitory

name: Goofang
cheats: [Late] "Lateness is beneath us." - If a Wizard joins the duel after the second round, Goofang will cast a Balance version of Steal Pips dealing Balance Damage at the Wizard.
[Blade] "I... do not please" - Sometimes, when Goofang casts Fireblade or Iceblade, he will cheat-cast the opposite School version of that Blade.
This cheat will sometimes chain multiple times in a row.
[Damage] "How dare you strike a Sayamaeez!" - Sometimes, when Goofang casts one of the following Attack Spells, he will cheat-cast the opposite School version of the same Attack:
[Spell] "An experimental effect!" - Sometimes, when Goofang casts one of his Spells, he will cheat-cast the opposite School version of that Attack.
He may also steal Blades.

name: Gorilla Spectral Guardian
cheats: This boss will cast a -50% no pip Smoke Screen if a player is marked and does not cast a charm within 2 rounds of being marked.

name: Gorn Hits-With-Sticks
cheats: Gorn Hits-With-Sticks

[Round] "Sticks and stones won't break these bones." - At the beginning of the first Round, or any Round Gorn doesn't have an Aura, he will cheat-cast an "Invulnerability" -300% Brace Aura for 99 Rounds.
This cheat will stop after Pork removes Gorn's Aura.
[Damage] "I shall hit you with sticks!" - Gorn will say this when he casts his Natural Attack.
Gorn's casts are scripted:
Round 1: Nature's Wrath
Round 2: Nature's Wrath (Tier 5a)
Rounds 3 & 4: Drop Bear Fury (Tier 4a)
Rounds 5 & 6: Centaur (Tier 5a)
Round 7: Forest Lord (Tier 5a)
Round 8: Natural Attack (Gorn Hits-With-Sticks)
Rounds 9 & 10: Bonetree Lord
Round 11+: Natural Attack (Gorn Hits-With-Sticks)
Captain Pork
[Minion] "But I can... with some preparation. Hold your ground, Wizard, I'll think of something." - Captain Pork will say this when he joins the battle.
[Afterlife] If Captain Pork is defeated before he removes Gorn's Aura, he will cast a version of Blessing, restoring himself to 100% Health.
Round 1 - "Wizard, I need a Life Pip, quick!":
[Pork's Request (Life)]
Round 2 - "Fire Pip incoming... right?":
[Pork's Request (Fire)]
Round 3 - "Just a little Ice Pip to top this off.":
[Pork's Request (Ice)]

"And now... try these sticks and stones, Gorn!" - When Captain Pork has a Life, Fire, and Ice Pip, he will use his turn to cast Pork's Plan, which removes an Aura from, deals 3,001 Fire Damage to, and applies a +30,000 Damage Trap on all enemies.
[Damage] If Captain Pork is defeated either on the turn he removes Gorn's Aura or afterwards, the battle will be declared lost on the turn after and the Wizard will be sent back to The Oasis.
spellNotes: The Spells in the cast list below will be used during the Rounds specified in the cheat notes regardless of the caster's Pips.
As a Monstrology Minion, Gorn can only cast his Natural Attack.

name: Gourmand Ramsey
cheats: [Round] On Round 1, Gourmand Ramsey starts the Round by casting a Shadow Spell, forcing all Wizards to pass.
[Minion] "Does this chicken look cooked to you?!?" - Uses a Shadow Spell to summon Apollo Bright One (Rank 21).
Apollo Bright One uses an Intercept 100% Damage Shadow Sentinel.
[Spell] "You've used so much thyme, The Professor arrived in the Telegraph Box to save us all!" - Casts a Shadow Spell that does ???

[Charm][Trap][Global] "There's enough garlic in here to defeat every Vampire in Darkmoor!"- If a Wizard uses a positive Charm, Trap, or Global, Ramsey will casts a Shadow version of Monster Mash that removes 25% of the Wizard's max Health on the Wizard with the lowest health, and deals 1 Shadow Damage to self.
(Because this Spell removes max Health, this will ignore any Wards or Traps on the targeted Wizard.)
For Charms, the Monster Mash will be cast on the receiver of the Charm.
Spells such as Volcanic Golem will trigger this cheat.
The following Spells do not trigger this cheat.
AoE traps, such as Mass Feint and Mass Fire Trap
Power Play
Frostfeather
King Artorius
Rebirth
Attenuate
Frenzy

name: Grandfather Spider
cheats: "You're late... or are you early?" - If a Wizard joins the duel after the second Round, then Grandfather Spider will interrupt-cast a Shadow version of Insane Bolt on the Wizard, dealing 2,000 Shadow Damage and removing 3 pips.

"You will not defeat me!" - At the beginning of the first Round, Grandfather Spider will summon a Spiderling Minion. The Minion will become active on the next Round and interrupt-cast a permanent version of Shadow Sentinel which provides Intercept 90%, +80 Critical Block, and -30% Incoming Damage.
If the Spiderling is defeated, then Grandfather Spider will summon another one three Rounds later.
Only one Spiderling can be up at a time.

Grandfather Spider will only summon as many Spiderlings as there are Wizards engaged in the duel. Once that number of Spiderlings has been defeated, he will unsuccessfully attempt to summon a Minion every three Rounds.
"Spin the wheel! I'm enjoying this!" - At the end of every third Round, Grandfather Spider will interrupt-cast a Spell that switches the first turn of the duel.

"Time, time, time, see what's become of me" - At the end of a number of Rounds dependent on the number of Wizards engaged in the duel, Grandfather Spider will interrupt-cast a Shadow version of Dimension Shift that steals all positive charms and wards from all Wizards.
Every 8 Rounds with 1 Wizard present.
Every 7 Rounds with 2 Wizards present.
Every 6 Rounds with 3 Wizards present.
Every 5 Rounds with 4 Wizards present.
"Surprised? So am I!" - Grandfather Spider will use his Natural Attack on a random Wizard and then cast Healing Current on himself.
"You had your chance, I'm ending this" - Grandfather Spider will cast an Iron Sultan.
"That's the spirit!" - If a Feint is placed on Grandfather Spider, then he will cast Swap Ward to switch the traps with the Wizard who cast it.
This can be avoided with Indemnity or Melt.
"Time needs chaos! One direction is boring!" - If a Bad Juju is placed on Grandfather Spider, then he will interrupt-cast Sacrifice on himself.
spellNotes: Casts an Aegis-protected Shadowblade, Stormblade (+30%), and Reaperblade.
Reaperblade incorrectly states +35% Storm Damage on both Blades.
Casts an Indemnity-protected Windstorm (+25%), and Mass Feint (+70%/+30%).
Deals 110 Shadow Damage per Pip, despite the Spell card's 3-Pip maximum description.

name: Grandfather Spider (Challenge)
cheats: Shadowbones
[Ward] "Tag... You're it!. - At the beginning of the first Round and every Round after his Mark has been removed, Shadowbones will mark a random Wizard with a Stun Block named "Tag. I'm it!".
[Damage] "You're too fast!" - If a Marked Wizard damages Shadowbones with a single-target Spell on the next turn, he will remove the Mark.
[Damage][All Enemies (Squared)] "They're not playing!" - If an All Enemies Spell is used, Shadowbones will restore himself to full Health and give a Shadow Pip to Grandfather Spider.
[Late] "Too slow." - At the end of the Round after a Mark is cast, if the Marked Wizard failed to damage Shadowbones, he will remove the Mark and cast Lord of Winter (Tier 5a) on them.
"You're not it!" - If a Wizard that isn't Marked targets Shadowbones, he will restore himself to full Health.

"If you're not going to play..." - If Shadowbones is defeated by a Wizard that isn't Marked, he will restore himself to full Health, cast Scarecrow (Tier 4a), and give a Shadow Pip to Grandfather Spider.
Bort Shadowmane
[Shield] "Check out my armor!" - At the beginning of the first Round and two Rounds after his Shields removed, Bort will cast a -80% Damage Ward of a random School on himself.
"You broke my armor, lucky guess!" - If Bort's Shields are removed, he will say this.
"Poor showmanship" - If Bort is defeated while he has a Shield, he will restore himself to full Health, cast Elemental Shield or Spirit Shield on himself, and give a Shadow Pip to Grandfather Spider.
Shadowwock
[Aura] - At the beginning of the first Round and the next Round after the Screeching Crimson Aura is cast, Shadowwock will cast a green Verdant Action Aura on itself.
[Aura] - At the beginning of a random Round, Shadowwock will cast a yellow Golden Caution Aura on itself.
[Aura] - At the beginning of the Round after the Golden Caution Aura is cast, Shadowwock will cast a red Screeching Crimson Aura on itself.

"You lose" - If any enemies take Damage while the Screeching Crimson Aura is active, Shadowwock will restore itself to full Health, cast Fire Dragon (Tier 5a), and give a Shadow Pip to Grandfather Spider.
Grandfather Spider
[Shadow Pip] - At the end of every Round, Grandfather Spider will gain a Shadow Pip.
"Be patient, you have other playmates." - If Grandfather Spider is damaged or targeted before his Minions have been defeated, he will restore himself to full Health.
"Spin the wheel! I'm enjoying this!" - At the end of every third Round, Grandfather Spider will cast a Spell that switches the first turn of the duel.
As Challenge Mode uses a snaking turn order, this does nothing.

"Oh this has looked like fun! My turn!" - At the beginning of the Round after his Minions have been defeated, Grandfather Spider will restore himself to full Health and gain the cheats of two of his Minions at random from the start of the next turn.
spellNotes: Casts a protected version of Reaperblade (Storm-Shadow).

name: Grandmother
locations: Empyrea: Northeast Aero Plains - Grandma's House
cheats: "Let's teach you some manners!" - If a Wizard is late to join the duel, Grandmother will Polymorph the Wizard into Grandmother.

"The curse spreads..." - Starting at the end of Round 1, Grandmother will Polymorph the Wizard into Grandmother for four Rounds with 7,500 Health, giving them the following crazy Spells they can cast while also confusing them.
Beguile can prevent this cheat.
Polymorph Spells include:
Curse of Grandma - Spell triggers Grandmother to Polymorph the Wizard.
Knitted Sweater - Stuns target for one Round.
Amigurumi - Restores 1,500 Health to self, and -90% Weakness to target.
Overfeed - Deals an unknown Shadow Damage over three Rounds.
Smooches! - Deals an unknown Shadow Damage to target.
Shiny Nickel - Deals an unknown Shadow Damage to target and -25% Weakness to target.
"Yes" - Will say this if a Wizard casts Curse of Grandma Spell, which resets the Polymorph onto a different Wizard, polymorphing and confusing them.
If Spell is cast on someone already Polymorphed, it will reset the turns the Polymorph lasts, while not confusing them, unless the Polymorph is on the last turn.
spellNotes: Deals 420 Shadow Damage for 4 Pips maximum.

name: Gray Man Golem (Challenge)
cheats: [Manipulation] "You cannot kill the undying" - At the beginning of the first round, each Gray Man Golem will receive a Guardian Spirit effect

[Round] "Magic mine... your power... mine!" - At the end of each round, if there is at least one wizard with a Positive Charm, a Gray Man Golem will target a random wizard and receive a number of Power Pips depending on the amount of Positive Charms.
1 or 2 charms = 1 Power Pip
3 charms = 3 Power Pips
4+ charms = 4 Power Pips

[Round] "Pain... makes... power!" - At the beginning of each round, if a Gray Man Golem is not at full health, it will cast a special version of Bladestorm that increases in value the lower his health is.
The minimum blade value is 20% and the maximum blade value is 100%. If the blade is 100%, it will also be Protected.

If there are multiple Gray Man Golems under full health, the value of the blade will be based on the first one in the duel circle. This cheat will only activate one per round, regardless of how many Gray Man Golems are in the battle.
Further testing is required to determine blade values between the minimum and maximum and their corresponding HP thresholds.

name: Gray Man Golem (Standard)
cheats: [Manipulation] "You cannot kill the undying" - At the beginning of the first Round, each Gray Man Golem will cast a Death version of Guardian Spirit that revives themself with 15% Health.

[Round] "Magic mine... your power... mine!" - At the end of each Round, if there is at least one wizard with a helpful Charm, a Gray Man Golem will target a random Wizard and receive a number of Power Pips depending on the amount of helpful Charms.
1 Charm = 1 Power Pip
2 Charms = 2 Power Pip
3 Charms = 3 Power Pips
4+ Charms = 4 Power Pips

[Health] "Pain... makes... power!" - At the beginning of each Round, if a Gray Man Golem is not at full Health, it will cast a special version of Bladestorm that increases in value the lower its Health is.
The minimum Blade value is +20% and the maximum Blade value is +100%. If the Blade is +100%, it will also be protected.

If there are multiple Gray Man Golems under full Health, the value of the Blade will be based on the first Golem in the duel circle. This cheat will only activate one per Round, regardless of how many Gray Man Golems are in the battle.
Further testing is required to determine Blade values between the minimum and maximum and their corresponding Health thresholds.

cheats: "You too? What a treat!" - If a Wizard joins after the battle has started, she will cast both a Curse (+25%) and a Hex (+35%), on the Wizard who joined late.

"You could have been one of us!" - In the first Round (and every third Round thereafter), she will cast Beguile on a random target (also includes Minions). This cheat only activates when two or more positions are filled in the duel.
If three or more Wizards are present, this cheat will trigger every Round.
"What is this, amateur hour?" - If a Wizard places a Feint on Gretta Darkkettle, she will cast Sacrifice (Death) to remove it.
Mass Feint (+75%) will trigger this cheat.
"Feel the power of the Cabal!" - At the end of every fifth Round, she will cast a Mass Infection.
spellNotes: Her Black Cat Pet may cast either Black Cat (80-120) or Black Cat (660-700).

Pet Maycast Spells will not trigger this cheat.

name: Grizzlebort the Unsociable
locations: Krokotopia: Marketplace of Ideas - Den of the Storyteller
cheats: [Curse] "All are weak against Grizzlebort!" – At the beginning of every Round, Grizzlebort interrupt-casts Plague.

"Ha-ha! Puny human!" - Grizzlebort casts Plague after a Wizard casts a Spell, even if they fizzle. He will cast it twice if both he and Grizzletroll are hit by the Spell. He will also cast it on a Wizard every Round they have a Damage over Time effect on them.
Pet casts will trigger this cheat.
Shields, and Spells that create multiple Charms or Traps, like Elemental Blade will not trigger this cheat.
[Healing] If Grizzlebort is defeated while his Plague cheat is still active, he will revive with full Health.

[Spell] "Sticks and stones may break my bones, but something, something" – At the beginning of the fourth Round (after spells are chosen), or when he revives, Grizzlebort will give each Wizard the following Spell:
[Stone Colossus (Tier 2b)]
[Myth] "I feel woozy. Where did that mountain come from?" - When hit by Stone Colossus (Tier 2b), Grizzlebort will remove all harmful Charms from Wizards, and stop his Plague cheat.

"Wait... you aren't supposed to do that!" - If a Wizard casts another Myth Damage Spell that removes harmful Charms on Grizzlebort, such as King Artorius (Myth) (Tier 2b), he will remove all harmful Charms from Wizards, and stop his Plague cheat.

name: Grounds-Creeper Willie (Tier 1)
locations: Housing Instance: Unforgiven Dead Gauntlet - Unforgiven Dead Gauntlet (Tier 1)
cheats: "Oh no, ye found me one weakness: showing up late." If a Wizard is late to combat, he'll cast a Moon Spell giving all Wizards Banish! (7 Pip).
[Banish! (7 Pip)]
This spell seems to be automatically cast when selected rather than targeting.
"Ach! I cannae be beaten, only banished! - " After the end of the first Round, Grounds-Creeper Willie (Tier 1) will give Wizards Banish! (7 Pip).
"Ach! Get 'Em, Bitey!" - If Grounds-Creeper Willie (Tier 1) is attacked, he will interrupt-cast Orthrus.
"Hide behind yer shields then!" - If a Wizard casts a Shield, Boss will cast Guidance on all Wizards.
This will only trigger once per Round.
"Time for a controlled Mana Burn" - Boss will cast an all enemies version of Mana Burn (Shadow) that also removes 1 Shadow Pip.
This spell will be cast repeatedly.
"Think ye can banish me? Try!" - Boss will say this line after he uses Mana Burn.

name: Guaman Skyfall
locations: Azteca: Floating Mountains - Seven Stabs of the Knife Temple
cheats: "Trying to soften me up?" - If a Wizard casts a Wand attack at Guaman, he will place a Stun Shield "mark" on the Wizard, indicating it is safe to attack.

If a Wizard has been marked and casts a single-target attack Spell at Guaman (excluding Wand attacks), he will remove the Stun Shield mark and all other Wards. Another Wand attack must be used in order to obtain the mark again.
Only one mark can be present on a Wizard at any given time.

"Your wand might help... next time!" - If a Wizard has not been "marked" with a Stun Shield and casts a single-target attack Spell at Guaman (excluding Wand attacks), he will cheat-cast a 0-Pip enhanced version of Leviathan, which deals 2,030 Storm Damage.
All Enemy Spells, such as Scarecrow and Humongofrog, will not trigger this cheat.

"I survive!" - If Guardian of Life is defeated while the Equalize Global is active, Guardian of Life will cast a version of Blessing, restoring 1 Health, and then restores 10 Health over 10 Rounds to self.
spellNotes: Casts a version of Major Vibrato that deals 5% max Health.
Casts a version of Leprechaun that deals 20% max Health.
Casts a version of Nature's Wrath that deals 30% max Health.

name: Hades the Unseen (Tartarus)
locations: Wizard City: Tartarus - Hall of Hades
cheats: Hades may gain an extra Pip or Power Pip at the start of each Round.
"The sands of your time are running out!" - Hades will cast Impending Doom on a random Wizard.
If the Damage over Time effect is shifted to any of the Bosses, Hades will use a Triage to remove it.
If any Wizard is defeated, Hades will cast a 1,890 Healing over 3 Rounds to all allies.
If all three Bosses are still in the battle, he will cast this Spell three times on each Boss.
If two Bosses are still remaining, he will cast the Spell two times on each Boss.
If only Hades remains, he will cast the Spell once on himself.
If a Wizard is not defeated on the Round the attack was cast, this cheat will not activate.
If a Wizard is defeated by a Damage over Time, this cheat will not activate.
If a Wizard defeats themselves, this cheat will activate, regardless of whether the Wizard is subsequently revived.
The above cheat is also noted to happen if Hades is still in the battle, and Zeus is defeated.
Poseidon may gain an extra Pip or Power Pip at the start of each Round.
"We Immortals are infallible!" - Poseidon will cast Infallible on his first turn and any other turn when he does not have an Aura. (Poseidon will also not cast Infallible unless he has no Aura.)

"You seek to weaken me? Drink from the depths!" - If any single-target Charm or Trap is cast on Poseidon, he will respond by using his Natural Attack, which removes all Traps that were placed on him. Multi-target Spells such as Windstorm or others can still be used.
Spells with single-target secondary effects (such as Efreet, Gnomes!, and Dr. Von's Monster) will trigger this cheat.
Fizzling will trigger this cheat.
Single-target Prisms will also trigger this cheat.
Indemnity can be used to protect Charms and Wards from removal.
Zeus may gain an extra Pip or Power Pip at the start of each Round.
"You hesitate too much!" - If a Wizard casts a Spell that costs 6 or more Pips, Zeus will cheat-cast a Minotaur on the Wizard.
Healing Spells will trigger this cheat.
Shadow Spells will trigger an additional Minotaur.
This cheat will activate regardless of which Boss is targeted.

name: Hades the Unseen (Tartarus, Challenge)
locations: Wizard City: Tartarus (Challenge) - Hall of Hades (Challenge)
cheats: [Round] "The sands of your time are running out!" - At the beginning of every Round, Hades will cast a +70% incoming Death Damage Aura for 4 Rounds on a random Wizard.
[Aura] "We Immortals are Infallible" - At the beginning of the first Round, Poseidon will cast Infallible.
[Blade][Aura] "Death is Eternal" - Whenever a Wizard casts a helpful Charm or helpful Aura, Hades will cast Tower Shield on himself.
[Harmful Aura] "Death is Vengeful" - Whenever a Wizard casts a harmful Aura, Hades will cast his Natural Attack on the caster.
Auras that increase incoming Damage such as Berserk or Galvanic Field will also trigger this cheat.
[Heal] "Death is Patient" - Whenever a Wizard casts a Healing Spell, Hades will cast Deathblade on himself.
[Shield] "Your punishment shall be swift!" - Whenever a Wizard casts a helpful Ward, Zeus will cast Minotaur on the recipient.
[Death] "Ahhh, the glorious taste of defeat!" - Whenever a Wizard, Poseidon, or Zeus are defeated, Hades will cast a protected +40% version of Deathblade on himself.

name: Hades the Unseen (Zeus Exalted Challenge)
cheats: "Tartarus is the true victor in war!" - If Hades and Ares Savage Spear are both present, Hades will interrupt at the start of the Round to use his Natural Attack on a random Wizard, that deals 4 Death Damage and applies 4 Damage over Time effects on the target. Then, Ares will use his Natural Attack that Detonates all Damage over Time effects, dealing 1,175 then 1, 2, and 3 Death Damage.
"The selfish belong in Tartarus!" - If a Healing Spell is cast on themself, Hades will cast a Shift Wraith Spell that deals 335 Death Damage and applies a -90% Infection on the caster.
This cheat will trigger with AoE Healing Spells.
This cheat will not trigger if a Wizard heals another player other than themselves.
Pet heals will trigger this cheat.
"Tartarus appreciates your donation." - If a Wizard or a Boss is defeated, Hades will cheat-cast Donate Power to whoever cast the defeating spell.
"Zeus sends his regards from Tartarus." - If Zeus is defeated, Hades will cast his Natural Attack on a random Wizard every two rounds.
spellNotes: Casts Lernaean Hydra and applies a -45% Accuracy Charm on all Wizards.
Casts Lycian Chimera and applies a -45% Damage Charm on all Wizards.

name: Headless Horseman
cheats: [Global] "This will be your grave. Your head will be my trophy." - At the beginning of the first Round, the Headless Horseman will cast a version of Doom and Gloom.
If the Doom and Gloom is replaced, the Horseman will recast Doom and Gloom.

[Round] "The Headless Horseman rides again!" - At the end of the first Round, the Horseman will cast a special version of Headless Horseman that deals 605 Death Damage to all enemies and applies a -30% Damage Charm on all enemies.
This will repeat every 5 Rounds.
[Spell] "LAUGHS" - The Horseman says this after he casts either Wraith or Monster Mash.
After the next time this is triggered, he will cast his special version of Headless Horseman at the end of the following Round.

[Round] "Don't lose your head! Here, have mine!" - At the end of the Round, if the Horseman did not cast his special Headless Horseman cheat, the Horseman will cast his Natural Attack on the Wizard with the current highest Health, which removes two helpful Charms from the target to apply a -35% Damage Charm per Charm removed. This also applies a -10% Healing Charm on all Wizards.

[Round] "Death Calls for the Weak and Unwary." - At the beginning of the Round, if a Wizard has six or more harmful Charms on them, the Horseman will cast a version of Mortality that deals 100% max Health Damage to the Wizard.
[Friend][Afterlife] "And Death comes for you all." - The Horseman says this after a Wizard is defeated.
[Feint] If a Wizard casts a Feint or Backdraft, the Horseman will cast a Death version of Cleanse Ward on himself which clears all harmful Wards on him, including protected ones.
[Dispel] If a Wizard casts a Dispel, the Horseman will remove all harmful Charms from himself, including protected ones.
spellNotes: The Headless Horseman's Natural Attack deals 666 Death Damage to target and applies a -10% Healing Charm on all enemies.

name: Heidi
cheats: "ALL WIZARDS WILL BURN!" - If the battle is joined after Round 2, Heidi will cast Fuel and Quench on the late Wizard/Wizards.
Note: Heidi casts her Balanceblade cheat before her turn, which is after the Wizard's turn if the Wizard goes first.

"I AM THE AVATAR OF THE INFERNO!" - At the start of Round 1 and every 3 Rounds after, Heidi will summon a Fire Elemental Minion if one isn't already present in the battle using her turn not using Pips.
Heidi will say this line when the Fire Elemental casts Raging Bull to re-summon another Fire Elemental.
After the Fire Elemental casts Raging Bull, it is defeated.

"LET THE FLAMES DANCE AND WRITHE!" - When a Wizard who is currently affected by a Damage over Time Spell which is not Fire Dragon (may be a bug) has their turn, Heidi will cast Balanceblade on the caster. This cheat will trigger once for each Damage over Time Spell on the Wizard, regardless of what the Wizard does for their turn. This includes casting a Spell, passing, fizzling, etc.
Aura Cycle: - After the Fire Elemental is defeated by her, she will cast the following Amplify spells.
If the Minion was defeated by the Wizard, she will not cast Amplify.
"I AM THE FIRE THAT MELTS STEEL!" - 1st Minion defeated - +20% outgoing Damage lasting 99 Rounds.
"ALL TRAPS MELT IN MY WAKE!" - 2nd Minion defeated - +40% outgoing Damage lasting 99 Rounds.
3rd Minion defeated - +60% outgoing Damage lasting 99 Rounds.
4th Minion defeated - +80% outgoing Damage lasting 99 Rounds.
5th Minion defeated - +100% outgoing Damage lasting 99 Rounds.
These Auras have the appearance of Berserk.
spellNotes: Casts a Mass version of Fire Trap (+25%).
Can cast Shadow Spells without Shadow Pips (may be a bug).

name: Hercules Poirot
locations: Empyrea: Southwest Aero Plains - Cretan Bull Field
cheats: "Late! Feel the power of my mythical strength!" - If a Wizard joins the duel late after the second Round, he casts Athena Battlesight, Witch's House Call (992-1,132), and Orthrus on the Wizard.
"I Feel Great!" If at full Health at the end of a Round, he casts a protected Balanceblade (+100%).

"This Will Not Do..." If not at full Health, he casts a unique Blessing which heals him for 10% of his total Health which is 1,518. This Heal is unaffected by any modifiers, such as Sanctuary or Infection, and it is not dispelled by Entangle.

name: Hierarch Lucien
cheats: There may be a bug in which he'll state two rules at once, which can lead to you being rewarded and punished or punished twice.
[Late] "LATE! YOU ARE LATE!" - If a Wizard is late he'll cast a Storm spell that applies -50% Weakness, a -100% Black Mantle, and also cast Beguile on the late Wizard.
[Blade] "New Rule: You must Blade!" - At the end of the first round he'll shout this out.
"Yes, obedience is key!" - If a Wizard Blades, he'll place a Tower Shield on them.
"That is against the rules." - If a Wizard casts a spell that isn't a Blade, Hierarch Lucien will cast Weakness (-50%) on them.
Maycasts will cause Lucien to cast this twice.
[Heal] "New Rule: You must Heal!" - At the end of X Round, he'll shout this out.
"Yes, obedience is key!" - If a Wizard Heals, he'll place a +50% Universal Lightning Strike on them.
"That is against the rules." - If a Wizard doesn't Heal, he'll place a -100% Black Mantle on them.
[Manipulation] "New Rule: Strike ALL your friends and be rewarded!" - At the beginning of the 3rd Round he'll cast Beguile on a random Wizard.
"Yes, obedience is key!" - If a Wizard casts an AoE Damage spell if there are targets to hit, he'll cast a -33% Health Insane Bolt on himself removing 33% of his total Health.
While Beguiled, casting a spell that is against the rules is allowed until the effect wears off.
spellNotes: Casts an AoE version of Disarm (1 Pip).

name: Hierophant of Destruction (Standard)
locations: Darkmoor: Black Lagoon - Bog of Vengeance (Standard)
cheats: "No child dares disobey the Scholomari" - Hierophant of Destruction will say this at the beginning of the first round with no effect. Whenever Hierophant of Destruction casts a buff, her minions will cheat-cast similar buffs of the same type.
[Global] = Stormblade
[Aura] = Magnify, Sleet Storm, or Empowerment
[Trap] = Ice Trap or Storm Trap
[Blade] = Balanceblade, Iceblade (+45%), or Stormblade
[Random] "My turn is when I say it is." - Randomly, Hierophant of Destruction will interrupt and cheat-cast Chain Lightning.
[Round] Cheat Cycle
This cheat cycle begins on the first round and repeats from the beginning starting on the next turn after the cycle ends.
"You will cast what I tell you!" - Hierophant of Destruction will interrupt and force a random wizard to cast one of the following spells:
[Elemental][Weakness] A special 15% version of Elemental Weakness
[Deferred Damage] A triple Bomb DoT that deals 50 Fire damage after 5 rounds.
[Heal over Time] A triple HoT that heals 50 health over 5 rounds.
[Spirit][Blade] A special 15% version of Spirit Blade

[Round] "The willful student hurts themselves" - At the end of the round two rounds after forcing a wizard to cast a spell (e.g. round 3 for the first cycle), Hierophant of Destruction casts a special Ice (if the hanging effect was blades or weaknesses) or Storm (if the hanging effect was DoTs or HoTs) damage spell that clears the hanging effects that wizards were forced to cast and deals 10% of the wizard's max health per hanging effect cleared.

Summoned Monstrology Minions that are Astral or Shadow School will be targeted by this cheat, but no Aura will be applied to them as there's no Aura for those Schools.
Summoned Monstrology Minions that are dual schooled will get a -200% Accuracy Aura for their second school.
"You know nothing of lore. Do your research!" - If a Wizard or Minion casts an Aura, High Loremagus (Tier 1) will recast the Aura on them.

name: Huac Cries Blood (Challenge)
locations: Housing Instance: Huac Cries Blood Rematch
cheats: [Afterlife] "Let the Old Day Die!" - If anyone on the Wizard's team is defeated, the Boss that defeated them will cast a version of Meteor Strike that deals 100% max Health Damage to all Wizards.

[All Enemies (Squared)] "Together, we return!" - If more than one enemy is defeated on the same turn, including if all enemies are defeated at the same time, all enemies will cast a version of Blessing, restoring themselves to 100% max Health.
[Ward] "No defense against the inevitable" - If a Wizard casts a Shield, Huac Cries Blood will cast Helephant (Tier 5b) on the Wizard with the lowest Health.
[Heal over Time] "All succumb to decay" - If a Wizard casts a Heal over Time, Skurkis Screaming Moon will cast Skeletal Pirate (Tier 5b) on the Wizard with the lowest Health.
[Curse] "No curse can snare me!" - If a Wizard casts a harmful Charm on Yacate Farwalker, Yacate Farwalker will cast Stone Colossus (Tier 5b) on the Wizard with the lowest Health.
Dispels and harmful Accuracy Charms do not trigger this cheat.

[Curse] "No curse can snare me!" - If a Wizard casts a harmful Charm on Huac Cries Blood or Skurkis Screaming Moon, Yacate Farwalker will cast Glacial Fortress on the Boss who receives the harmful Charm.

[Dispel] Dispels will trigger this cheat. If the harmful Charm is a Dispel cast on Huac Cries Blood, he will cast a protected +35% Fireblade on himself. If the harmful Charm is a Dispel cast on Skurkis Screaming Moon, she will cast a protected Deathblade (+40%) on herself.
Harmful Accuracy Charms do not trigger this cheat.
If a Spell is cast that applies harmful Charms on multiple enemies, such as Plague, Yacate Farwalker will only cast Stone Colossus and will not cast Glacial Fortress.
Yacate Farwalker's Glacial Fortress can be dispelled with Melt.

name: Jake the Smoke Monster
cheats: "Who misses Malistaire? I do!" - At the beginning of every second Round, Jake the Smoke Monster will cast Shift Malistaire on a random Wizard, dealing 85 Death Damage per Pip.
"In my version... Xibalba hit Celestia!" - If a Wizard casts an Aura, Jake the Smoke Monster will cast Mass Supernova.
"Everything Old is mine now!" - Jake the Smoke Monster will summon a Spiderling Minion.
"Behold my originality!" - If no Minions are left, Jake the Smoke Monster will summon another Jake the Smoke Monster (Minion).
"Electromagnetism!" - If a Wizard casts a negative Charm, Jake the Smoke Monster will cast a version of Insane Bolt (Moon), dealing either 550, 1,050, or 1,550 Damage to all enemies.
Spells that apply negative Charms as a secondary effect will trigger this cheat.
"Boom! Morganthe is back!" - After an unknown number of turns, Jake the Smoke Monster will cast a version of Death Morganthe Attack that deals 100% of the wizard's health.
When 2 or more Wizards are present
"Ooooh mystery!" - If a Wizard casts a Blade, Global, or a Trap Spell, Jake the Smoke Monster will respond with this.
"I dont like themes!" - If another Wizard casts a second Blade Spell, Global, or Trap on the same turn:
Second Blade and/or Global Spell: Jake the Smoke Monster will use an Ice version of Enfeeble that removes all Blades from all enemies.
Second Trap Spell: Jake the Smoke Monster will use a Fire version of Cleanse Ward that removes all Traps from all allies.
Note: Both a Blade/Global and a Trap can be cast in the same turn. The cheat only triggers if two of the same hanging effects are cast.

name: Jamburglar
cheats: "More Customers? You must pay for that!" - If a Wizard joins the battle after the first Round, Jamburglar will cast a single target Shadow version of Power Nova that takes 100% of their max health, instantly defeating them.

"I'm so sneaky and evil" - At the beginning of the first Round, Jamburglar will cast a Shadow Spell that removes all Pips from all Wizards, then casts a 99 Round version of Impede on each Wizard, then gives all Wizards 7 Power Pips, and casts Blinding Light (85%).
"Prepare to be Jamburgled!" - At the end of each Round after the first, Jamburglar casts a Shadow version of Power Nova that takes 15% of each Wizard's max Health and 10% of his own.
This Spell can trigger Jamburglar's Adapt, giving him a Power Pip from being hit by this Spell.
Spells that take a percentage of Health ignore all stats and hanging effects.
"Gum's Away!" - If anyone in the Wizard's side doesn't have Impede active, Jamburglar will cast it on them.
This cheat applies to summoned minions.
Bug: Dead Wizards will cause Jamburglar to repeatedly shout this cheat line as he detects them not having the aura active.
spellNotes: Casts a protected Shadowblade and Shadow Trap.

name: Kain von Shane (Challenge)
cheats: [Feint] "I am Lord Kain von Shane and I deserve dignity!" - If a feint is cast on Kain von Shane, he will cast a version of Dark Tribute on himself. This is an old version of Dark Pact that removes universal traps and applies a +30% balance blade on Shane.
[Curse] "I will not bow down to you!" - If a harmful Charm is cast on Kain von Shane, then he will interrupt-cast Disarm on the wizard who cast the Charm.
[Steal] "Don't drain me!" - If a Drain spell is cast on Kain von Shane, he will cast an Aegis-protected +100% Balanceblade on himself.
[Heal] "More life for me!" - If a Wizard casts a Healing Spell, then Kain von Shane will interrupt-cast a version of Vampire that deals Death Drain Damage and returns half Health to the caster.
Pet Maycast Heals will trigger this cheat.
This cheat will not trigger for Beguiled Wizards.
[Spell] "Who let the sun in here?" - If a Wizard casts as spell that has a sun in it (such as Power Nova,) Kain von Shane will cast a Protected Universal Dispel on himself.
Interrupt Cycle: This cycle begins on the second round and repeats every 3 rounds until it is reset.

[Blade] "Build my strength..." - At the beginning of the first round in this cycle, Kain von Shane will interrupt-cast a Star version of Supercharge that applies a +10% per pip universal damage charm on himself and gives himself a pip.
[Dispel] "...stun my prey..." - At the beginning of the second round in this cycle, Kain von Shane will interrupt-cast a Star spell that applies a Dispel to every wizard of their own school.
[Friend][Damage] "...and now the strike!" - At the beginning of the third round in this cycle, Kain von Shane will interrupt-cast Monster Mash on a random wizard.
Cycle Reset:
[Damage] "*hiss* Where was I?" - If Kain von Shane is targeted with an attack spell, then his cheat cycle will pause for one round and reset to the beginning.
[Damage over Time] Damage over time spells will only reset his cheat cycle on the turn they are cast.

name: Kaizoku (Tier 1)
cheats: [Shield] At the beginning of the first Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a -70% version of Tower Shield on himself.
[Damage] If Kaizoku is damaged by any Spell, then he will interrupt-cast to replace the Tower Shield.
[Manipulation] Manipulation Spells that remove helpful Wards can be used to remove Kaizoku's Tower Shield without causing him to replace it.
This cheat will stop occurring after all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated.
[Damage] If Kaizoku is damaged by an all-enemies Damage Spell, then he will interrupt-cast a -60% version of Black Mantle on the caster.
[Damage] At the beginning of every second Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a Star Spell that deals 75 Star Damage to all Wizards.

The first time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged in the normal order from right to left. The second time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged from left to right. The order in which Wizards are damaged alternates every time this cheat occurs.
Sometimes, the Spell will deal 600 Star Damage instead of the usual 75 Star Damage.
[Minion][Afterlife] After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, Kaizoku will begin interrupt-casting this Spell every Round, and twice in a row every fourth Round.

[Ward] "You stopped my Halberd?" - If a Wizard that is damaged by this cheat had any Wards, not including Damage Absorption Wards, then the Spell will not damage any other Wizards, and Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a Spell to remove all Wards from that Wizard and himself. This will not trigger if the Wizard that has a Ward is the last Wizard to be damaged.
[Minion][Afterlife] "Time to turn things up!" - After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, he will remove all Wards from himself.

When all of the Minions are gone, he removes the Tower Shield, and all other shields he currently has in effect.

name: Kaizoku (Tier 4)
cheats: At the beginning of the first Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a -85% version of Tower Shield on himself.
If Kaizoku is damaged by any Spell, then he will interrupt-cast to replace the Tower Shield.
Manipulation Spells that remove helpful Wards can be used to remove Kaizoku's Tower Shield without causing him to replace it.
This cheat will stop occurring after all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated.
At the beginning of every second Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a Star Spell that deals 450 Star Damage to all Wizards.

The first time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged in the normal order from right to left. The second time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged from left to right. The order in which Wizards are damaged alternates every time this cheat occurs.
After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, Kaizoku will begin interrupt-casting this Spell every Round.

"You stopped my Halberd?" - If a Wizard that is damaged by this cheat had any Wards, not including Damage Absorption Wards, then the Spell will not damage any other Wizards, and Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a version of Cleanse Ward that removes all Wards from that Wizard and himself. This will not trigger if the Wizard is the last target to be damaged.
"Time to turn things up!" - After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, he will remove all Wards from himself.

name: Kaizoku (Tier 5)
cheats: At the beginning of the first Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a -90% version of Tower Shield on himself.
If Kaizoku is damaged by any Spell, then he will interrupt-cast to replace the Tower Shield.
Manipulation Spells that remove helpful Wards can be used to remove Kaizoku's Tower Shield without causing him to replace it.
This cheat will stop occurring after all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated.
If a Trap is cast on Kaizoku, then he will interrupt-cast Cleanse Ward on himself to remove it.
At the beginning of every second Round, Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a Star Spell that deals 600 Star Damage to all Wizards.

The first time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged in the normal order from right to left. The second time this cheat occurs, Wizards will be damaged from left to right. The order in which Wizards are damaged alternates every time this cheat occurs.
After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, Kaizoku will begin interrupt-casting this Spell every Round.

"You stopped my Halberd?" - If a Wizard that is damaged by this cheat had any Wards, not including Damage Absorption Wards, then the Spell will not damage any other Wizards, and Kaizoku will interrupt-cast a Spell to remove all Wards from that Wizard and himself. This will not trigger if the Wizard that has a Ward is the last Wizard to be damaged.
"Time to turn things up!" - After all of Kaizoku's Minions have been defeated, he will remove all Wards from himself.

This cheat will activate even if the Prism that is active on Kallah is not used up by the Damage Spell.

name: Khai Tengri
locations: MooShu: Jade Palace - Khai Tengri's Dojo
cheats: "A Charm! Let's even the playing field!" - Casting a Blade will cause him to interrupt-cast a Hex (+35%) on the Wizard who cast it.
Global Spells will trigger this cheat, but Aura Spells will not.
Pet Spells will not trigger this cheat.
"A ward! Let's even the playing field!" - Casting a Trap (including Feint) or a Shield will cause him to interrupt-cast a Hex (+35%) on the Wizard who cast it.
The text for this cheat only appears after Khai casts the Hex.

name: Khan
locations: Empyrea: Aeriel Jungle - Tower of Sycorax
cheats: "Don't insult my intelligence!" - If a Wizard joins the duel after the second Round, Khan will cast a Moon version of Mana Burn on the Wizard that removes 4 Pips and summons one of the Minions listed below.
At the beginning of the duel, he will use his turn casting a Moon Spell to summon at least one of the following Minions:
A Moon School version of Cleanse Ward is also cast on him after Summoning his first minion, before the Wizard can cast spells.

"I'm afraid it's more difficult than you think, Wizard!" - If two or more Wizards are present in the duel, he will summon an additional random Minion. And if a Minion is defeated, Khan will summon another random Minion from the list above.
"From Tartarus' heart I will grapple with thee!" - At the end of every 5th Round, Khan will do the following:
Casts a Moon version of Steal Health that sacrifices a random Minion, healing Khan for 7,000 - 11,000 Health.

Casts an all enemies version of Wraith that gives Khan a +500% Blade first, then deals 500 damage of that School, without the Steal effect. The School of the Blade and Wraith depends on the Minion that Khan sacrifices.
"Is that the best you can do? I'm laughing at your superior magic!" - If a negative Ward is placed on Khan, then his minion will cast an Ice spell to steal the trap onto themselves.
Mass Feint (+75%) triggers this cheat.
Cheat does not trigger when there are no minions present.
Only one Trap is swapped onto minion when this Spell is cast.
This can be avoided with Indemnity.

name: Khnum RainMaker
spellNotes: Casts a version of Sheet Lightning that deals 125 Damage.

name: Khonsu (Challenge)
cheats: "Combat prowess is inversely proportionate to adorability" - At the beginning of the first Round, Khonsu will Polymorph each Wizard into one of the following forms at random for 99 Rounds and remove all of their Pips:
[Fire] Marshfellow (Challenge) - Mallow Inferno
[Ice] Snowball (Challenge) - New Ice Age
[Storm] Glowbug Zapper (Challenge) - Zap-aclysm
[Myth] Snipe (Challenge) - Snipe Hunter
[Life] Horned Frog (Challenge) - Plague of Frog
[Death] Gummy Bunny (Challenge) - Hare Razer
[Balance] Wombat (Challenge) - Wombat Evolved
If a Wizard casts their above Spell and does not meet its condition to deal Damage, a copy of the Spell will be added to their hand.

"Hmm. Perhaps I should increase the adorability quotient" - After a Wizard successfully attacks Khonsu with one of the above Spells, Khonsu will Polymorph the Wizard who attacked him into another one of the above forms, remove their current Pips and give them 2 Power Pips. After Khonsu has been hit the same number of times as there are Wizards, Khonsu will unpolymorph all Wizards, and Polymorph himself into one of the following forms at random for 100 Rounds:
"I will rain down death..." - Hunhau
"Feel hatred, Wizard" - Malus
"Your rules do not apply to me" - Personal Daemon
"All shall be consumed" - The Devourer

name: Khonsu (Standard)
cheats: "Combat prowess is inversely proportionate to adorability" - At the beginning of the first Round, Khonsu will Polymorph each Wizard into one of the following forms at random and remove all of their Pips:
[Fire] Marshfellow (Standard) - Marsh of War (added to hand by Cuteness Overload)
[Ice] Snowball (Standard) - Splat Flurry
[Storm] Glowbug Zapper (Standard) - Zap, Crackle, Pop!
[Myth] Snipe (Standard) - Fur Baby (cast on Minion after meeting condition)
[Life] Horned Frog (Standard) - Everyone Croaks (added to hand by Nature Call)
[Death] Gummy Bunny (Standard) - Sweet Death
[Balance] Wombat (Standard) - Wombat Frenzy
If a Wizard joins the battle after the second Round, Khonsu will Polymorph each Wizard into one of the above forms at random and remove all of their Pips, then heal himself to 100% Health.
The Snipe Polymorph will not be assigned to any Wizard if there are 4 Wizards present.

"Hmm. Perhaps I should increase the adorability quotient" - If there is more than 1 Wizard in battle when attacked, Khonsu will Polymorph the Wizard who attacked him into another one of the above forms and remove their Pips.
Sometimes this cheat may activate more than once from only a single attack, which will lower the amount of times needed to attack before the following cheat activates.
After the above cards have been used the same number of times as wizards in the duel (IE if there are 2 wizards in the duel, 2 spells need to be used), Khonsu will give all Wizards the following:
[Break Free (Moon)]
It is not necessary to use the 'Break Free' Spell. Wizards may continue to obtain copies of their Spell and fight as their Polymorph, regardless of the number of Wizards present.
Polymorph Cycle
After Wizards have been given a 'Break Free' Card, Khonsu will begin to Polymorph into one of the following forms on that Round and the end of every 5th Round afterward.
"If I can't change you, I will upgrade myself" - Polymorphs into Malistaire Drake for 3 Rounds.
"The Shadow shall fall!" - Polymorphs into Morganthe for 3 Rounds.
"Perhaps something more chaotic..." - Polymorphs into Grandfather Spider for 3 Rounds.
"You will learn to fear Nothing..." - Polymorphs into Dasein for 3 Rounds.

name: Killer Krok
cheats: [Late] "Tick-tock, Tick-tock, says the Krok" - If a Wizard joins the battle after the first Round, Killer Krok will cast Bad Juju on the late Wizard.
[Trap][Curse] "That won't even chip my scales" - If a Trap or Harmful Charm is placed on Killer Krok, he will cast Sacrifice (Death).
[Shadow] "Now you'll see why they call me Killer Krok" - He will cast Dark Fiend.
[Manipulation] "*Growls*" - After Killer Krok casts Bad Juju, he will follow up with Sacrifice (Death).

name: King Amadeo
locations: Wizard City: Crab Alley - Royal Palace

name: King Avernus
cheats: [Random] "King Avernus casts Gut Punch of Paralysis. Does it succeed?" - At the end of every second Round, King Avernus will cast an Ice Spell on the Wizard with the highest Health that will randomly do one of the following effects:
"Critical success! You're stunned!" - The targeted Wizard will take 200 Ice Damage and is Stunned.
"It does succeed! You take damage!" - The targeted Wizard will take 200 Ice Damage.
"It fails!" - Nothing happens.
"Critical fail! He stuns himself!" - King Avernus is Stunned.
King Avernus' Relic Cheats

[Afterlife] "I call upon the Relic of Eternal Avernus to revive me!" - At the beginning of the first Round, if "Seek Blessing" (Middle Room) was not chosen first, King Avernus will cast a version of Guardian Spirit that restores 17% of his maximum Health (362 Health) upon being defeated.
If King Avernus' Afterlife is removed by Clerical Terror, this cheat will retrigger.

[Shield] "Emblem of Avernal Shielding, protect me!" - If "Find Treasure" (Left Room) was not chosen second, the first time King Avernus is targeted or Damaged by an attack Spell each turn, he will cast a -50 Damage Ward on himself.

[Shadow Creature] "Medallion of Shadow Summon, bring me a thrall from the void!" - At the beginning of the third Round, if "Sneak Around" (Right Room) was not chosen third, King Avernus will cast a version of Dark Fiend that deals 200 Shadow Damage to all enemies with no additional effects.
Wizards' Relic Cheats

[Afterlife] "You have my Relic of Eternal Avernus? No!" - At the beginning of the first Round, if "Seek Blessing" (Middle Room) was chosen first, a version of Guardian Spirit will be cast on all Wizards that restores 50% of their maximum Health upon being defeated.

[Shield] "No, Emblem of Avernal Shielding, don't protect them!" - If "Find Treasure" (Left Room) was chosen second, after a Wizard is targeted by an attack Spell, a -50 Damage Ward is applied on them.
If the Wizard's team is targeted with an All Enemies Spell, all Wizards will receive a -25 Damage Ward.

[Shadow Creature] "You have stolen my Medallion of Shadow Summon?" - At the beginning of the third Round, if "Sneak Around" (Right Room) was chosen third, a random Wizard will cast a version of Dark Fiend that deals 1,700 Shadow Damage to King Avernus and has no additional effects.
spellNotes: Casts a 0-Pip Storm Spell that applies a +25 Damage Charm.
Casts a 1-Pip version of Qismah's Curse that deals 50 Death Damage to all enemies.
Casts a 2-Pip version of Deer Knight that deals 75 Death Damage to and applies a -25 Damage Charm on all enemies.
Casts a 2-Pip version of Scarecrow that deals 50 Death Drain Damage to all enemies and heals the caster for the Damage dealt.

name: King Borr (Tier 2)
locations: Grizzleheim: Savarstaad Pass - Savarstaad Pass Gold Key Room
cheats: If you're late, you must wait! - If a Wizard joins the battle late, King Borr (Tier 2) will cast Medusa (865) on the Wizard who joined late. Grendelynn (Tier 2) will cast Shadow Sentinel that provides 75% Intercept on King Borr after being revived.
At the start of the first Round, Grendelynn (Tier 2) will cast Shadow Sentinel that provides 75% Intercept on King Borr.
I call Your Feint! - If a Feint is cast on King Borr, he will cast an AoE Cleanse Ward (Shadow, -1).

You Won't Fall Until I Command It! - If Grendelynn (Tier 2) is defeated before the Boss, King Borr (Tier 2) will use a Moon Blessing on Grendelynn (Tier 2) restoring 100% Health, and Grendelynn will recast Shadow Sentinel on King Borr.
Avenge Me! - King Borr will say this when he's defeated.

name: King Borr (Tier 3)
locations: Grizzleheim: Savarstaad Pass - Savarstaad Pass Gold Key Room
cheats: You are my Shield! - At the start of the first Round, Grendelynn (Tier 3) will cast Shadow Sentinel that provides 75% Intercept on King Borr.
I call Your Feint! - If a Feint is cast on King Borr, he will cast Cleanse Ward (Shadow, -1) that removes all traps.

You Won't Fall Until I Command It! - If Grendelynn (Tier 3) is defeated before the Boss, King Borr (Tier 3) will use a Moon version of Blessing on Grendelynn (Tier 3), restoring 100% Health, and Grendelynn will recast Shadow Sentinel on King Borr.
If you're late, you must wait! - If a Wizard joins the battle late, King Borr (Tier 3) will cast Medusa (865) on the Wizard.

Avenge Me! - After King Borr (Tier 3) is defeated, Grendelynn (Tier 3) will be defeated. This cheat may be bugged though, because the You Won't Fall Until I Command It cheat will activate, restoring the Minion's Health again. Needs verification.
spellNotes: Deals 460 Myth Damage for 4 Pips maximum.

name: King Borr (Tier 4)
locations: Grizzleheim: Savarstaad Pass - Savarstaad Pass Gold Key Room
cheats: "You are my shield!" - Grendelynn (Tier 4) will cast a Shadow Sentinel that provides 75% Intercept.
If Grendelynn is Beguiled, the Intercept protects the Wizard team for as long as the Beguile is active.
"If you're late, you must wait!" - If a Wizard is late to combat, King Borr will cast Medusa (865) on the Wizard.
"You won't fall until I command it!" - If Grendelynn is defeated before King Borr, a Moon version of Blessing will be cast on Grendelynn that restores 100% Health.
If both King Borr and Grendelynn are defeated in the same round, this cheat still activates.
"I call your Feint!" - If a Feint is cast, King Borr will cast an AoE version of Cleanse Ward (Shadow, -All) to remove all unprotected Traps.
Mass Feint will trigger this cheat.
The Balance version of Feint does not trigger this cheat.
"Avenge Me!" - King Borr will say this if he is defeated before Grendelynn.

name: King Detritus
locations: Wizard City: The Drains - Abandoned Backyard
cheats: "Your tardiness is disgusting!" - If any Wizards join the duel after the second Round, King Detritus will summon an additional Minion as well as cast Steal Health on one of his Minions and move up to the next Polymorph stage.
If there are no Minions present, King Detritus will cast Steal Health on a random Wizard.

"Ah ah ah!" - If a Feint is cast on King Detritus, one of his Minions will cast a Shadow Spell twice to move the Trap onto itself. Feints can be safely cast during the first Round, while the Minions are not yet active.
Mass Feint will trigger this cheat.
"Refuse, unite!" - At the beginning of the first Round, King Detritus will cast a Sun Spell that summons random Trash Minions equal to the number of Wizards present.
"Your sacrifice is for the greater garbage good!" - King Detritus will cast a Sun version of Steal Health on his Minion to heal himself 100% of the Damage dealt to the Minion.
"The trash is piling up!" - King Detritus will summon another random Trash Minion if he is out of Minions.

Polymorph Cycle - In this cycle, King Detritus will Polymorph into a larger version of himself, which gives him an Aura but loses all of his stats, including Power Pips, Shadow Pips, Masteries, Incoming Healing, Critical rating, Critical Block, Pierce, Outgoing Damage, Incoming Boosts, and Resistances. The following stages will show the Aura's stats along with the dialogue:
"The trash man cometh!" - Gives +5% Damage, +5% Armor Piercing, and +5% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
"Now is the day of the discarded!" - Gives +10% Damage, +10% Armor Piercing, and +10% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
"I love the smell of garbage in the morning" - Gives +15% Damage, +15% Armor Piercing, and +15% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
"This fight has become quite the dumpster fire" - Gives +20% Damage, +20% Armor Piercing, and +20% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
"Time for the trash to take you out!" - Gives +25% Damage, +25% Armor Piercing, and +25% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
After these 5 cheats, lines will recycle giving King Detritus the following Auras:
Stage 6 - +30% Damage, +30% Armor Piercing, and +30% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
Stage 7 - +35% Damage, +35% Armor Piercing, and +35% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
Stage 8 - +40% Damage, +40% Armor Piercing, and +40% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
Stage 9 - +45% Damage, +45% Armor Piercing, and +45% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.
Stage 10 - +50% Damage, +50% Armor Piercing, and +50% Resistance, for 99 Rounds.

name: Kravenly the Hunter
cheats: At the beginning of every round, Kravenly will cast Natural Attack (Kravenly) at a random Wizard.
Stunning him does not prevent this cheat from occurring.
This cheat can be dispelled.
When reaching the following Health thresholds, Kravenly the Hunter will cast the following spells.
Spirit Blast dealing 1,120 Death Damage, 1,095 Life Damage, or 1,190 Myth Damage to all enemies.
Spectral Blast dealing 1,320 Fire Damage, 1,095 Ice Damage, or 1,650 Storm Damage to all enemies.
"Health at 75%" - Once his health reaches 75% (11,280 remaining), he will interrupt cast his Spirit Blast.
"Health at 50%" - When his health reaches 50% (7,520 remaining), he will interrupt cast his Spirit Blast.
His Spectral Blast may trigger from this instead.
"Health at 25%" - When his health reaches 25% (3,760 remaining), he will interrupt cast his Spirit Blast.
If multiple health cheats are triggered at once, the Spirit Blasts may not occur immediately together. One will trigger the same round and the others on following rounds.
spellNotes: Deals 153 Life Damage for 1 Pip, 245 Life Damage for 2 Pips, or 340 Life Damage for 3 Pips + 630 Life Damage over 3 Rounds.

name: Kravenly the Hunter (Gallery)
cheats: Kravenly will remove any negative charms that are placed on him (e.g. Weakness or dispels).
At the beginning of every other Round, Kravenly will cheat-cast a Natural Attack (Kravenly) at a random Wizard, which deals 340 initial Life damage plus 630 Life damage over 3 Rounds.
Stunning him does not prevent this cheat from occurring.

"Health at 75%" - Once his health reaches 75% (19,100 health remaining), he will cast an multi-target version of Spirit Blast, that deals 1,120 Death Damage, 1,095 Life Damage, or 1,190 Myth Damage on all Wizards.
"Health at 50%" - When his health reaches 50% (12,733 health remaining), he will cast his Spirit Blast.
"Health at 25%" - When his health reaches 25% (6,366 health remaining), he will cast his Spirit Blast.
His Backlash can trigger this cheat.
Bringing his health down to 50% or 25% from one attack, will still trigger each stage of this cheat to be cast consecutively.
"Your body and soul are mine once again!" - At the end of Round 1, Ghost Dog will summon one Seijun Killer Minion and one Hagakure Blade Minion. (They become active in Round 3.)

"Again feel the poetry of war!" - At the end of Round 2 (and every 5 Rounds thereafter), he will cast a Damage over Time (DoT) spell that deals 400 Death Damage per Round for 10 Rounds (575 Death damage in Shadow form).

"The way of the Samoorai is found in death!" - At the end of Round 5 (and every 5 Rounds thereafter), he will cast a version of Detonate (Death) that detonates 5 DoTs on all Wizards dealing 2,800 Death Damage. This includes the "poetry of war" DoT, but DoTs placed before this cheat DoT will remain.
The target of these attacks will be the "most intimidating" Wizard (most blades or casted traps), or the Wizard in the first position (Sun spot) by default.

If the Detonate (Death) cheat fizzles, he'll cast it again to hit his target, then recast it two more times (for a total of 4 casts - though nothing actually occurs the last two times). This may be intentional, for the purpose of removing any Strangle dispels that are placed on him.
Shift or Triage can be used to safely remove the DoT (make sure to time it in between the Detonate (Death).
"I retain my resolve!" - If a Wizard casts a positive ward (e.g. shields), he will cast a 0-pip Shatter to remove the shields.
Shields placed on other Wizards will not trigger this cheat.
Mass Feint will trigger this cheat.
Multi-target spells, such as Legion Shield or the Spirit Armor applied by Rebirth, will trigger this cheat, but only for the Wizard that cast the spell.
